title: Assistant Store Manager - Crossword Bookstores - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Crossword Bookstores - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!
